hero.headline: Azure & Ancient
hero.subHeadline: A 1,000-year dive into Swahili civilization where the monsoon winds dictate the pace of life.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: We avoid the resorts. Our Coast is defined by the carved teak doors of Lamu Old Town and private dhow charters navigating by the stars.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: Navigating the mangrove channels by traditional wooden dhow. No engines, only the snap of canvas and the rhythm of the tides.

sensoryChapters.chapterTitle: Chapter II: The Scent of Cloves
sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: A walking tour of the stone alleys of Lamu, where time has stood still and donkeys remain the only logistics.
Snorkeling in the protected coral gardens of Watamu. A total psychological immersion into the silence of the sea.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: The classic 'Beach to Bush' reversal—from Swahili tides to the snows of Kilimanjaro.
